mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, request_id, asset_id, asset_code, inspection_point_id, inspection_point_name, record_date, inspected_at, status, measured_value, unit, result_description, inspector_id, version, created_at, updated_at, @@server_id AS served_by_server_id, DATABASE() AS served_by_database
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inspection_record ( tenant_id, request_id, asset_id, asset_code, inspection_point_id, inspection_point_name, record_date, inspected_at, status, measured_value, unit, result_description, inspector_id, version, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{requestId}, #{assetId}, #{assetCode}, #{inspectionPointId}, #{inspectionPointName}, #{recordDate}, #{inspectedAt}, #{status}, #{measuredValue}, #{unit}, #{resultDescription}, #{inspectorId}, #{version}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )

INSERT IGNORE INTO inspection_record ( id, tenant_id, request_id, asset_id, asset_code, inspection_point_id, inspection_point_name, record_date, inspected_at, status, measured_value, unit, result_description, inspector_id, version, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{tenantId}, #{requestId}, #{assetId}, #{assetCode}, #{inspectionPointId}, #{inspectionPointName}, #{recordDate}, #{inspectedAt}, #{status}, #{measuredValue}, #{unit}, #{resultDescription}, #{inspectorId}, #{version}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
